name: Cat Needs
short_description: Cats are adorable beings but they can be temperamental, some like one thing and some like another. Find the purrrfect way to organize the cats so that everyone has their wishes fulfilled. Be careful for them don't fight each other.... or eat each other's food by mistake. ΦωΦ
detailed_description:
/ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\

In a house with many cats, it can be hard to always fulfill everyone's wish, but that's your mission here.

Using the arrow keys to make each of the cats jump over the other's head until each one finds its goal.

Each cat has different mechanics, some can jump high, some jump short, some just won't be willing to jump. Some are hungry, some are not but will eat their sibling's food if given the chance.

Move the cats carefully and make sure each one finds what it needs.

In this game, you will find:

♥ 50 levels of puzzles

♥ As you progress through the levels, you will meet more cats and the difficulty will increase.

♥ Achievements

♥ Cute cats

/ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\ ♥ /ᐠ｡ꞈ｡ᐟ\
